email_subject: Application for Customer Service OTC UK Markets (Brussels based)
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service OTC UK Markets position in Brussels, as advertised via Michael Page. With a strong background in customer service, order management, and SAP, I am confident in my ability to manage the order-to-cash process effectively.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client relationships and coordinate with internal teams to ensure timely delivery. Previously, I worked in warehouse and logistics at Katoen Natie, where I maintained accuracy in a fast-paced environment. My experience includes using SAP for order tracking and inventory management, and I am proficient in English (professional) with Dutch at A2 level.

I am detail-oriented, organized, and thrive in fast-paced settings. I look forward to contributing to your team.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service OTC UK Markets position in Brussels, as advertised via Michael Page. With a solid foundation in customer service, order management, and SAP, I am well-prepared to handle the full order-to-cash process for the UK market.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites and coordinate with sales, logistics, and finance teams to ensure smooth operations. This experience has honed my organizational and multitasking skills, as I handle multiple client accounts simultaneously while maintaining accuracy and timeliness. Previously, I worked at Katoen Natie in a high-volume logistics environment, where I developed a strong sense of urgency and attention to detail.

I have hands-on experience with SAP for order processing and inventory management, and I am proficient in English (professional) with Dutch at A2 level. My customer-focused approach and problem-solving skills enable me to address inquiries and resolve issues efficiently. I am comfortable working independently and in a team, and I am eager to contribute to your company's operational excellence.

I am particularly drawn to this role because it offers exposure to international markets and the opportunity to grow professionally. I am ready to start immediately and look forward to discussing how my skills align with your needs.

Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Experience managing order-to-cash processes and customer inquiries in a fast-paced environment
Proficient in SAP for order management and tracking
Strong organizational and multitasking skills from handling multiple client accounts
Excellent communication skills in English (professional) and Dutch (A2)
Customer-focused approach with problem-solving abilities and ability to work independently
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with experience in customer service, order management, and SAP. At Episto, I manage client relationships and coordinate with internal teams to ensure timely delivery. Previously worked in high-volume logistics at Katoen Natie, developing strong organizational and multitasking skills. Proficient in English (professional) and Dutch (A2). Customer-focused, detail-oriented, and ready to manage the order-to-cash process for the UK market.

CORE SKILLS
- Order-to-Cash Process Management
- Customer Service & Inquiry Resolution
- SAP (Order Processing, Inventory Management)
- Organizational & Multitasking Skills
- Communication (English Professional, Dutch A2)
- Problem-Solving & Independent Work
- Fast-Paced Environment Adaptability
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client relationships and coordinate with sales, logistics, and finance to ensure smooth operations
- Handle order-to-cash processes for client projects, ensuring accuracy and timeliness
- Address client inquiries and resolve issues efficiently
- Track performance and provide regular updates to management
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Processed orders and managed inventory using SAP

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
